intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered rear, mid-band hall, LDK smoke test, no carport. 12x10 lot gives an 8x6 envelope = 48 m2 floor -- the published minimum for this topology (true floor is ~11.9x10, confirmed by bisection). Master ensuite + common bath share wet-stack plumbing walls at the rear along with kitchen; a hallway is tucked into the mid sub-column between standard (front) and common (rear) -- all bedroom and bath doors open onto the hall, never directly onto the public side. Public side is a real living/dining/kitchen split stacked front-to-rear -- the hall's open mouth connects to dining (the middle-row public room), not living. Unlike the squarish cl_hall_gr->cl_hall_ld sibling, this conversion is narrow-band: verified feasible only from ~12x10 through roughly 15x11.5.
must_haves: common bath accessible from the hall
clustered baths at the rear sharing plumbing with the kitchen
mid-band hallway serving both bedrooms and the common bath
separate living, dining, and kitchen rooms stacked front-to-rear
